extension.summary: FenSkeleton – lean multi-debrid resolver for TMDbHelper
extension.description: Fast, minimal debrid resolver built on the stable v0.1.10 engine. Pairs with TMDbHelper for browsing. Supports Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize and TorBox. External scrapers such as CocoScrapers are supported. Works with FenMage skin.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any content. For personal use with content you have the right to access only.
extension.news: v0.0.13 - Android safety fix: directory refreshes and stale widget paths can no longer trigger Random Next Up playback; playback now uses a separate explicit click-only route. v0.0.3 - Clean video-addon package: removed embedded skin bundle; fixed Random Next Episodes to actually shuffle Next Up; retained TorBox device-code auth and icon set. v0.0.2 - v1 base checkpoint: TorBox device-code auth retained; Random Next Episodes route added; updated icon set retained. v0.0.1 - Initial public release.
